title: pelargonium × belladonna
intro: Pelargonium × belladonna, also known as the Black Beauty or Black Magic, is a hybrid of the pelargonium plant species, native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial qualities. The plant has been used to alleviate various health issues, such as sore throats, colds, and fever, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its health benefits.
